data.body: Gate 1a: intent-aligned — ARTIFACTS_DIR mismatch; reviewer sub-agent writes reviewer-findings.json to its own ARTIFACTS_DIR hash, while record-review.sh reads from orchestrator's ARTIFACTS_DIR; prior fix 04ca-4c91 (commit 3119aed9) added --findings-file flag to record-review.sh but the calling workflow (COMMIT-WORKFLOW.md and review dispatch prompt) was NOT updated to pass it. High confidence.
